## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Series B deck preparation, Surge onboarding, and product branding strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Series B pitch planned for second week of September, targeting $50M raise at 300-500M valuation](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Surge project viewed as strategic partnership and co-marketing opportunity, not scalable model](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Focus on making design outputs more reproducible to enhance service offerings and upsell potential](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Considering "Output.ai" ($94k) as potential brand name for workflow platform](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)

## Topics

### Series B Preparation

  - [Targeting second week of September for pitching](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [Aiming for $50M raise at 300-500M valuation](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
  - [Key deck components:](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
      - [Visually break down concepts (service, workflows, expert layer)](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [Emphasize team and customer logos](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
      - [Showcase live demos of Atlas and Studio](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Narrative similar to Series A, with added progress highlights](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)

### Surge Project Strategy

  - [Viewed as co-marketing opportunity and strategic partnership](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Not intended to be scalable or reproducible model](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Potential future benefits:](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
      - [Access to 100,000 expert network](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
      - [Brand association and trust-building](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
      - [Insights for high-quality, lower-volume outputs](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)

### Ideal Customer Profile

  - [Examples: Engine.com, Sentinel One, Outreach](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Characteristics:](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [Large content needs](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [Huge surface area](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [Big market](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [Overwhelmed internal teams](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)

### Design Output Strategy

  - [Focus on creating reproducible, high-quality design assets](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Aim to standardize layouts, formats, and components](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Simplify customization to typography, colors, text, and graphics](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Balance between specialized projects and scalable offerings](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)

### Product Branding Considerations

  - [Potential acquisition of "Output.ai" domain for $94,000](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Considering separate branding for different product layers:](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=2171.0)
    1.  Expert layer (possibly "Expert Layer")
    2.  Workflow platform (possibly "Output")
    3.  Studio (current product)
  - [Debating between unified vs. separate branding strategies](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=2171.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Develop first draft of Series B deck by next week](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Create reproducible design assets for client engagements](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Improve onboarding process, focusing on content inventory and feedback integration](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=2032.0)
  - [Further evaluate branding strategy for different product layers](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=2171.0)
  - [Consider acquisition of "Output.ai" domain](https://fathom.video/share/i2n2yVq7syovx3QRmFHGEz4gaKwJ6PLt?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
